scripts.dev:start: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- sh -c 'node ./node_modules/@angular/cli/bin/ng.js serve --port "$APP_HOST_PORT"'
scripts.test:e2e: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- playwright test --project=local-chrome-baseline
scripts.test:e2e:ui: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- playwright test --ui
scripts.test:e2e:integration: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- playwright test --project=local-chrome-integration --project=docs-integration
scripts.test:e2e:live-esncard: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- playwright test tests/specs/profile/user-profile-live-esncard.spec.ts --project=local-chrome-integration --grep '@needs-live-esncard'
scripts.test:e2e:docs: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- playwright test --project=docs-baseline
scripts.test:e2e:docs:publish: bun run env:runtime && DOCS_OUT_DIR=/Users/hedde/code/evorto-pages/apps/documentation/src/app/docs DOCS_IMG_OUT_DIR=/Users/hedde/code/evorto-pages/apps/documentation/public/docs dotenv -c dev -- playwright test --project=docs-baseline
scripts.db:push: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- drizzle-kit push --force
scripts.db:studio: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- drizzle-kit studio
scripts.db:reset: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- drizzle-kit push --force && dotenv -c dev -- bun helpers/database.ts
scripts.docker:check: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- bun helpers/testing/runtime-preflight.ts docker
scripts.docker:ps: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose ps
scripts.docker:stop: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose down
scripts.docker:resume: bun run docker:check && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose up --no-recreate -d
scripts.docker:start: bun run docker:check && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose down && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose up --build -d
scripts.docker:start:watch: bun run docker:check && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose down && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose up --build -w
scripts.docker:start:foreground: bun run docker:check && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose down && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose up --build
scripts.docker:webserver: bun run docker:check && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose up --build
scripts.deps:update:drizzle: bun add drizzle-orm@rc && bun add -D drizzle-seed@rc drizzle-kit@rc
scripts.ops:sentry:sourcemaps: sentry-cli sourcemaps inject --org lukas-heddendorp --project evorto ./dist && sentry-cli sourcemaps upload --org lukas-heddendorp --project evorto ./dist
